projectDescription: A Python CLI application demonstrating how to connect to and perform CRUD operations on a MariaDB database using an MVC architecture.
keyFeatures: MariaDB connection management via a singleton-style connector class
MVC architecture separating data models, business logic, and CLI UI
Employee CRUD operations: list, lookup by ID, insert, and delete
Department queries including employee count per department via JOIN
Interactive CLI menu with input validation and cancellable operations
Parameterized SQL queries to prevent injection vulnerabilities
publicApiSurface: Employee dataclass (empno, ename, job, mgr, hiredate, sal, comm, deptno)
